uint8.message: Incompatibility found during conversion: Layers 'proj_in', 'gate_relu6': unsupported type [QuantizedDense, QuantizedReLU]: InputData sign incompatible with previous layer.

quantization.message: Layer mix_dw3x3 of type DepthwiseConv2D is not supported for Akida conversion

summary.proven_path: A tf_keras Sequential Dense -> ReLU6 -> Dense -> ReLU6 -> Dense surrogate quantizes and converts with cnn2snn when checked with signed int8 input assumptions.
summary.blocked_path: A Conv2D + DepthwiseConv2D probe is not yet Akida-ready here because conversion rejects the depthwise kernel / input-sign combination and quantization leaves unserializable layers.
